name: Ramelius Resources Limited
description: Ramelius Resources Limited (ASX: RMS) is a prominent Australian gold producer that has been listed on the Australian Securities Exchange since 2003 and in production since 2006. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration, evaluation, mine development, and operation of gold projects. Headquartered in Western Australia, Ramelius operates a portfolio of high-quality assets, including the Mt Magnet and Edna May gold mines. With a strong focus on sustainable mining practices and operational excellence, the company continues to grow its production profile through strategic exploration and development across its extensive tenement holdings in Australia.
